oneLiner: Scripture that speaks your name, your stress, your moment.
targetAudience: Anyone who wants the Bible to feel like it was written for the exact second they're living.
corePurpose: Turn flat verses into living words that meet you in your real-life crisis, joy, or transition.
keyFeatures: Daily verse written for your age, gender, country & struggle
One-tap plain-language explanation of any chapter
Lifeline topics (money, family, school, grief) that re-write today's verse for your pain
$5/mo premium unlocks personalized stories, poems, songs + unlimited chat with the verse
Upcoming church integration: pastor's sermon becomes your Monday devotional
differentiators: No generic commentary—every word factors in your profile
No ads, no tracking SDKs, no user-generated noise
Born from 3 a.m. stage-four-cancer desperation—built to save lives, not clicks
Church plug-in turns pulpit messages into personal follow-ups
Voice conversations coming next—pray out loud, get spoken back
favoritePart: The instant someone sees today's verse and whispers, 'How did it know?'
whatNext: Roll out church dashboard so pastors can watch anonymized struggles and tailor next Sunday's message to the exact pain in the pews.
toneProfile: Urgent empathy—like a friend who's been in the ICU at 3 a.m. and won't let you read another flat verse.
founderStory: At 3 a.m. during stage-four cancer, the founder searched how to end his life. A Bible app offered a verse that meant nothing. He swore technology could make Scripture speak the language of feeding tubes, insomnia, and family despair—and began building the engine that night.

faq.question: Do I need an account?
faq.answer: Email unlocks the verse; extra profile details unlock the personalization.

faq.question: Is my data sold?
faq.answer: Never. No ads, no trackers, no third-party pixels.

faq.question: Can pastors see my personal struggles?
faq.answer: Only anonymized, grouped insights—never your name or details.

faq.question: What if I cancel the $5 subscription?
faq.answer: You keep the daily verse and lifelines; premium chat & content pause until you return.

faq.question: Which Bible translation is used?
faq.answer: You pick—KJV, NIV, ESV, etc.—and the explanation still speaks your language.

marketing.subtitle: Today's verse, written for your exact life right now.
marketing.description: At 3 a.m. in a cancer ward, a verse felt empty—so we built the app that makes Scripture speak your name. Bible for Life Stages gives you a daily verse rewritten for your age, gender, country, and current struggle (money, family, grief, school). Tap once for a plain-language explanation, dive deeper with lifeline topics, or upgrade to $5/mo for unlimited chat with the verse itself—stories, poems, songs, and soon voice conversation. No ads, no tracking, just God talking to the real you. Coming next: your pastor's sermon becomes Monday's personalized devotional.
screenshotHeadlines: Today's verse already knows your struggle
Lifelines re-write the Bible for your pain
Chat with the verse like it's 3 a.m. and you're not alone
Premium unlocks songs, poems, stories—written for you
Pastor mode: Sunday's word becomes Monday's personal follow-up
